onChange.script:
curr = currentValue.value if currentValue is not None else None
	sectionKeys = ["attributes", "cavities", "assignments"]
	if curr is not None and 0 <= curr < len(sectionKeys):
		self.custom.activeTab = sectionKeys[curr]

customMethods.name: _loadTool
_anyDirty
openConfirmUnsaved
completeSwitch

messageHandlers.script:
clickedId = payload.get('id') if payload else None
	if clickedId is None:
		return
	currentId = (self.view.custom.selected.meta or {}).get('Id') if self.view.custom.selected else None
	if clickedId == currentId:
		return
	# Gate on meta-header dirty OR any draft section dirty (Attributes /
	# Cavities). Assignments is non-draft and never reports dirty, so it
	# is naturally excluded.
	if self._anyDirty():
		self.view.custom.pendingSwitch = {'kind': 'tool', 'to': clickedId}
		self.openConfirmUnsaved()
		return
	self._loadTool(clickedId)

toolId = (payload or {}).get('id')
	if toolId is None:
		return
	self._loadTool(toolId)

section = payload.get('section') if payload else None
	isDirty = bool(payload.get('isDirty')) if payload else False
	if not section:
		return
	nextMap = dict(self.view.custom.sectionDirty or {})
	nextMap[section] = isDirty
	self.view.custom.sectionDirty = nextMap
	# Deferred completion: once a staged switch's sections have all gone
	# clean (and the meta header is clean too), finish the switch.
	pending = self.view.custom.pendingSwitch
	if pending and not any(nextMap.values()) and not self.view.custom.dirty:
		self.completeSwitch()

config.script:
meta = (self.view.custom.selected or {}).get('meta') or {}
	toolId = meta.get('Id')
	if toolId is None:
		return
	code = meta.get('Code') or ''
	name = meta.get('Name') or ''
	label = (code + ' - ' + name) if code and name else (code or name or 'this tool')
	system.perspective.openPopup(
		id='mpp-confirm-destructive',
		view='BlueRidge/Components/Popups/ConfirmDestructive',
		modal=True,
		showCloseIcon=False,
		params={
			'title':        'Retire Tool',
			'message':      'Retire ' + label + '? This will mark the tool as deprecated.',
			'confirmLabel': 'Retire',
			'replyMessage': 'toolRetireConfirmed'
		}
	)

props.text: Select a tool from the list to view its details, or click + Add Die to create a new one.
Select a tool from the list to view its details, or click + Add Die to create a new one.
